rationale: No direct conflict. §48.315 establishes fixed per-student allotments and a $35M floor for deaf programs. Homestead exemption changes affect local property tax revenue but do not alter these statutory allotment amounts or their funding mechanism.
quote: The program administrator or fiscal agent of a regional day school program for the deaf is entitled to receive for each school year an allotment of $6,925, or a greater amount provided by appropriation, for each student receiving services from the program.
_note: Indirect fiscal pressure on state budget may exist but no statutory conflict with this section.
